spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (WebGPU 'core-features-and-limits') and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: The repaired script now probes live limits and includes a requiredLimits tester that exercises accepted and rejected device requests.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: The requiredLimits tester exposes the boundary and failure branches instead of only reporting the happy-path adapter table.

references.rationale: Page cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/4744775089258496 self-heal link.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: Core Limits Comparator now has valid inline JavaScript, a live limits table, a requiredLimits boundary test, and the required ChromeStatus link.
